title: TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services:
TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services!
